title: Legality of E-Contract in India
author: Satish Kumar
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Business transactions have been completely transformed by the introduction of electronic contracts, or e-contracts, which offer efficiency, speed, and convenience. However, there has been debate regarding the enforceability and legitimacy of e-contracts under Indian law. This study examines the legality of electronic contracts in India during the digital age by examining pertinent legislation, court rulings, and developing patterns. It explores the fundamentals of e-contracts, including their enforceability, validity, and difficulties in the digital world. This essay seeks to shed light on the Indian legal environment surrounding e-contracts by analyzing the Information Technology Act, 2000 and current jurisprudential developments.
